briefs.title: Council to Consider Update on Burnaby's Online Recreation Registration System Improvements
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to receive an information update on improvements made to the city's online recreation registration system (WebReg) since it launched in 2023, including new pass options and changes to how residents book programs.
briefs.action_required: If you use Burnaby recreation facilities, review the new pass options — annual, monthly Max-Flex, or one-month — to find the best fit.
